artifact_title: A Finite Balanced-Ternary Computational Regime for Native Polynomial-Coefficient Construction: Paper I Artifact
author: Younus M. Younus
paper_title: A Finite Balanced-Ternary Computational Regime for Native Polynomial-Coefficient Construction with Full Strict Windowed Fractional Canonization and Certified Governance
description: Frozen implementation and evidence boundary supporting Paper I. This archive contains the final source package, production output, diagnostic stress output, workbook-ready tables, the original v28 implementation protocol, and a publication-nomenclature addendum mapping legacy v28 terms to FDNC, UCAC, and MDNC.

main_artifacts.role: Publication-nomenclature crosswalk from legacy v28 terms to FDNC, UCAC, and MDNC

reproducibility.randomness: No stochastic component is used in the reported campaign.
